---
title: "Roy Mwavita | Data Analyst & M&E Specialist"
description: "Portfolio of dashboards, R Shiny apps, and monitoring & evaluation projects in public health and development programs."
image: images/preview.png
---

---

## 👤 About Me


::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

::: {.card}

Research Data Analyst & Monitoring and Evaluation Professional with over three years’ experience in managing, analyzing, and reporting complex datasets across health research, child welfare, and USAID-funded programs. 

Experienced in supporting studies involving 6,500+ beneficiaries, improving reporting efficiency by 40%, reducing manual data validation workload by 60%, and developing automated analytics solutions using R, R-Shiny, Python, Excel, KoboToolbox, and Power BI.  

My work focuses on improving data quality, automating reporting systems, and building tools that support evidence-based decision-making in development programs.


:::

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

### 🧠 Skills

::: {.card}

**Data Analysis & Programming**
- R (tidyverse, Shiny, ggplot2, highcharter)
- Data cleaning & transformation
- Statistical reporting

**Monitoring & Evaluation**
- M&E frameworks
- Indicator tracking systems
- Data quality assessment

**Data Tools**
- KoboToolbox
- Excel advanced analytics
- Git & GitHub (basic version control)

**Visualization & Reporting**
- Interactive dashboards
- Quarto & R Markdown reporting
- Automated reporting systems


:::
:::
:::



---

## 🚀 Explore My Work

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

::: {.card}

### 🧩 Projects

A collection of data systems, tools, and analytical solutions I have developed.

[View Projects →](projects.qmd)

:::

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

::: {.card}

### 📊 Dashboards

Interactive R Shiny dashboards for monitoring program performance and tracking key indicators in real time.

[View Dashboards →](dashboards.qmd)

:::

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

::: {.card}

### 📘 R Toolkit Digest

A curated series of practical R tutorials and applied data workflows for real-world MEAL and analytics work.

[Read Digest →](digest.qmd)

:::

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

::: {.card}

### 📰 Newsletter

Insights, learning notes, and reflections on data, monitoring, and evaluation practice.

[Read Newsletter →](newsletter.qmd)

:::

:::

:::

---

## 📫 Contact

::: {.card}

- 📧 lennicroy@gmail.com  
- 🔗 [LinkedIn→]("https://www.linkedin.com/in/roy-mwavita-495b50220/")
- 🔗 [GitHub→]("https://github.com/roy-mwavita0/")

```{=html}
<a href="files/CV_Roy Mwavita.pdf" target="_blank">
  <button style="padding:8px 14px; border:none; border-radius:8px; background:#2c3e50; color:white; cursor:pointer;">
    📥 Download CV
  </button>
</a>

```

:::
